From May 1 to May 31, 2026, you spent $1,651.48 on business expenses:

Business Rent: $350.00
Business Travel: $1,115.08

A couple spots to be extra careful with:

Business Travel: Travel, meals, and transportation can easily get mixed with personal spending. Keep this to true business trips, client meetings, and related costs only.
Office Supplies: Purchases from Amazon, big-box stores, or office retailers might be personal or business, so it’s worth double-checking each transaction description and receipt.

Business Rent is usually more straightforward, just keep it consistently categorized so your business financials and any potential tax deductions stay clean and accurate.
